activity_question: What award did Tony Orlando & Dawn receive for their hit song?
bonus_fact: Gold records are awarded for selling 500,000 copies of a single or album.

title: Deep Purple's Keyboard Maestro Born
story: A musical legend entered the world on June 9, 1941. Jon Lord, the future keyboardist of rock band Deep Purple, was born in Leicester, England. His magical fingers would later create the iconic sounds in hits like 'Smoke On The Water'. Lord's talent also graced the music of Whitesnake, leaving a lasting mark on rock history.
activity_question: What famous rock band did Jon Lord play keyboards for?
bonus_fact: Jon Lord was classically trained and often blended classical music with rock.

title: A Sci-Fi Star Is Born
story: Blast off to 1943! On June 9, a future star of science fiction entered our world. Joe Haldeman was born in Oklahoma City, destined to become a famous American author. His most celebrated book, The Forever War, would one day captivate readers with thrilling space adventures and thought-provoking ideas about the future.
activity_question: What is Joe Haldeman's most celebrated book?
follow_up_question: What kind of stories do you think Joe Haldeman writes about in his science fiction books?
